focus_points.label: Current goals and priorities check-in
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard bi-weekly topic. Important to align on what he's focusing on and ensure it matches the team and client expectations.

focus_points.label: Energy and motivation levels
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — typical for junior roles. Checking in on motivation and stress can help identify any early signs of burnout or disengagement.

focus_points.label: Understanding of role and expectations
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — common gap for juniors. Ensuring clarity on what 'good' looks like can help set him up for success.

focus_points.label: Areas for growth and development
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — typical for junior roles. Discussing where he wants to develop can guide future opportunities and training.

focus_points.label: Support needed from manager
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in hygiene. Opens the door for him to express what he needs more of from you to succeed.
